description_long: This is a large, modern two-story house with a flat roof and a prominent covered front porch supported by columns. The exterior is primarily white with light wood accents around the windows and doors, and the house features expansive windows, including several large picture windows and a set of French doors at the rear. The driveway leads to a spacious garage on the right side, and the front yard is landscaped with low hedges and a paved walkway. The roof includes a partially open terrace area, and the overall structure is boxy with clean, geometric lines. The house has multiple entry points, including a main entrance under the porch and secondary doors at the back. The design emphasizes openness and natural light, with a blend of contemporary and traditional elements.
description: A large, modern two-story house with a flat roof, expansive windows, a covered front porch, and a spacious garage. The exterior is white with wood accents and landscaped surroundings.
description_view_0: View 0 shows the left side and partial front of the house, highlighting the driveway, garage, and the covered porch with columns.
description_view_1: View 1 displays the rear of the house, featuring large picture windows, French doors, and the open terrace on the roof.
description_view_2: View 2 presents the right side of the house, showing the side windows, the porch roof, and the continuation of the driveway.
description_view_3: View 3 is the direct front view, emphasizing the main entryway with its covered porch, columns, and landscaped front yard.
attribute_window_arrangement: asymmetrical placement with large picture windows and grouped panes
attribute_entryway_design: Main entryway features a covered porch with columns, steps, and a prominent front door, complemented by landscaping and a paved walkway.
